name: Tag Regulator
description: Normalize and infer Zotero tags with an optional controlled vocabulary file.

prompts.common:
- file inputs: valid_tags={{ input.valid_tags }} (optional; absent means pure inference mode), digest_markdown={{ input.digest_markdown }} (optional evidence)
- inline inputs: metadata={{ input.metadata }} (optional), input_tags={{ input.input_tags }} (optional; missing means [])
- parameters: valid_tags_format={{ parameter.valid_tags_format }} (only applies when valid_tags is provided), infer_tag={{ parameter.infer_tag }} (does not disable pure inference mode when evidence exists), tag_note_language={{ parameter.tag_note_language }}

Execute the tasks strictly according to `SKILL.md`. Output **exactly one valid JSON object** to stdout.
